result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet-blazorproxy [options]

Options:
  -ta|--targetassembly <TARGET_ASSEMBLY>              target assembly path. In this assembly is the startup file.
  -tbp|--targetbasepath <TARGET_BASE_PATH_FOR_FILES>  target base path. this path contains all the required return types to copy with the proxies.
  -od|--outputdir <OUTPUT_DIR>                        this is the dir to copy the proxies and return types to.
  -oa|--outputassembly <OUTPUT_ASSEMBLY>              this is the assembly to check if return types exists.
  -n|--namespaces <NAMESPACES_JOINED>                 the namespaces of the return types. seperate with ','
  -?|-h|--help                                        Show help information

Options:

  -tbp|--targetbasepath <TARGET_BASE_PATH_FOR_FILES>  target base path. this path contains all the required return types to copy with the proxies.

  -n|--namespaces <NAMESPACES_JOINED>                 the namespaces of the return types. seperate with ','
  -?|-h|--help                                        Show help information
